⣀⣀⣀⣀⣀⣀⣀⣀⣀⣀⣀⣀⣀⣀⣀
    ⢀⣤⣶⣿⣿⣿⣿⣿⣿⣿⣿⣿⣿⣿⣿⣿⣿⣿⣿⣿⣷⣤⡀
   ⣴⣿⣿⣿⣿⣿⣿⣿⣿⣿⣿⣿⣿⣿⣿⣿⣿⣿⣿⣿⣿⣿⣿⣿⣦
  ⣾⣿⣿⣿⣿⣿⣿⣿⣿⣿⣿⡿⠿⠿⠿⠿⢿⣿⣿⣿⣿⣿⣿⣿⣿⣿⣷
 ⣿⣿⣿⣿⣿⣿⣿⣿⡿⠋⠁          ⠈⠙⢿⣿⣿⣿⣿⣿⣿⣿

⢸⣿⣿⣿⣿⣿⣿⠃     ⢀⣾⣿⣿⣿⣷⡀     ⠘⣿⣿⣿⣿⣿⣿⡇

      ⠙⠿⣿⣿⣿⣿⣿⣿⣿⣿⣿⣿⣿⣿⣿⣿⣿⣿⣿⠿⠋

PORK-OS BIOS v1.0

Copyright (c) 2026 Porkbun LLC

 

Detecting hardware...

Snout Interface Controller .... OK

Curly Tail Bus Adapter ....... OK

Oink Sound Card .............. OK

Mud Cooling System ........... OK

Truffle Storage Drive ........ OK

 

Loading PORK-OS kernel...

Mounting /dev/trough .......... OK

Starting oink daemon .......... OK

Initializing domain registry ... OK

SYSTEM READY. Press any key or wait...

[ SYSTEM.PIG — Meet Your Mascot ]

                      │ ● │ │ ● │

                           │
                    ╭──────┴───────╮
                    │  ♥ PORKBUN ♥ │
                    │  .com  $10/yr │
                    ╰──────────────╯

PORK-OS mascot loaded from /usr/local/pig

Species: Sus domesticus (Internet Edition)

Occupation: Domain Name Registrar & Good Vibes Officer

Special Ability: Making domains affordable since 2014

Favorite Food: Fresh HTML with a side of CSS

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

[ ALBUM.EXE — The Porkbun Pig: A Life in Photos ]

From dial-up to the metaverse, our pig has seen it all.

1995
  ╭──────────────────╮
  │    ╭────╮        │
  │    │◉  ◉│  ┌──┐  │
  │    │ oo │  │::│  │
  │    ╰─┬──╯  │__│  │
  │      │   ╔══════╗│
  │    ╭─┴─╮ ║ AOL  ║│
  │    │   │ ║ v3.0 ║│
  │    ╰───╯ ╚══════╝│
  ╰──────────────────╯

"You've Got Oink!"

Baby pig discovers the internet via AOL dial-up. Immediately tries to register coolpig.com. It was taken.

2001
  ╭──────────────────╮
  │  ★ UNDER ★       │
  │  CONSTRUCTION     │
  │    ╭────╮  ⚒     │
  │    │◉  ◉│ /web/  │
  │    │ oo │ ring/   │
  │    ╰─┬──╯ next   │
  │  ♪  ─┤  ♪ ♪     │
  │ [MIDI PLAYS]     │
  │ visitor #000042  │
  ╰──────────────────╯

"GeoPorkCities"

The pig builds their first website. Features: animated GIF background, auto-playing MIDI, a hit counter, and Comic Sans. Beautiful.

2007
  ╭──────────────────╮
  │     ╭────╮       │
  │     │◉  ◉│ ╭───╮ │
  │     │ oo │ │ 📱│ │
  │     ╰─┬──╯ │top│ │
  │ ╭─────┤    │ 8 │ │
  │ │MyPig│    ╰───╯ │
  │ │Space│          │
  │ │ .com│  *oink*  │
  │ ╰─────╯          │
  ╰──────────────────╯

"The MyPigSpace Era"

Pig gets a flip phone and a MySpace page. Top 8 friends are all other pigs. Profile song: "Oink In Da Club" by 50 Pork.

2014
  ╭──────────────────╮
  │  ╔══════════════╗│
  │  ║   PORKBUN    ║│
  │  ║  EST. 2014   ║│
  │  ╚══════════════╝│
  │     ╭────╮       │
  │     │◉  ◉│ ♥     │
  │     │ oo │/      │
  │     ╰─┬──╯       │
  │  "domains for    │
  │   everyone!"     │
  ╰──────────────────╯

"The Porkbun Is Born"

Our pig finds their true calling: making domain registration affordable, simple, and actually fun. The rest is internet history.

2026
  ╭──────────────────╮
  │   ╭────╮  🤖     │
  │   │◉  ◉│ "hello" │
  │   │ oo │ AI pal  │
  │   ╰─┬──╯         │
  │  ╭──┤  ╭───────╮ │
  │  │🎮│  │PORK-OS│ │
  │  │VR│  │ v1.0  │ │
  │  ╰──╯  ╰───────╯ │
  │  LIVING THE DREAM │
  ╰──────────────────╯

"Present Day"

Pig codes with AI, games in VR, and still registers domains at unbeatable prices. Some things never change. Some things get better.

2099
  ╭──────────────────╮
  │  ·  ✦  ·  ✧  · │
  │ ✧  ╭────╮  ✦    │
  │    │◉  ◉│       │
  │  · │ oo │  ·    │
  │    ╰─┬──╯ ✧     │
  │  ╔═══╧═══╗      │

  │  ║DOMAINS║      │
  │  ╚═══════╝  ✦   │
  ╰──────────────────╯

"The Future"

Year 2099: Porkbun now sells quantum domain names across parallel dimensions. Price? Still cheaper than the other guys.

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

[ NEWSFEED.EXE — The New Pork Times ]

PNN Pork News Network BREAKING

BREAKING: Local Pig Registers 10,000th Domain, Says "I Can Stop Whenever I Want"

By Snout McTrotter | 2 hours ago

A local pig was seen registering yet another .com domain at 3 AM, bringing their total to an estimated 10,000 domains. "It's not an addiction," the pig insisted while browsing available .io names. "Porkbun just makes it too easy and too cheap. This is their fault, really." Friends and family staged an intervention, but were distracted when they learned .dev domains were on sale.

DNS Propagation Delays Blamed on Mercury Being in Retrograde

By Hamlet O'Brien | 5 hours ago

Internet astrologers confirm what sysadmins have long suspected: DNS propagation times are directly correlated with planetary alignment. "When Mercury is in retrograde, nameservers just vibe differently," explained one horoscope-certified network engineer.

P! Pork-tacu GAMING + TECH

Review: Pork-OS v1.0 Might Be the Best Operating System Nobody Asked For

By GamerPig42 | 1 hour ago

In a world dominated by Windows and macOS, a scrappy upstart pig-themed OS has entered the chat. "It boots with oinks, the file system is organized by farm sections, and the default wallpaper is a sunset over a domain registration page," our reviewer notes. "10/10 — it has a little something for everyone." We're giving it the coveted Pork-tacu Editor's Choice award.

Top 10 Domain Names That Sound Like Video Game Bosses

By XxPorkSlayerxX | 3 hours ago

#1: darkfiredragon.gg, #2: ultimatevoid.io, #3: shadowbane.dev — "These domains go HARD," writes our listicle expert. "Imagine getting an email from someone@chaosblade.gg. That person has definitely beaten Elden Ring at level 1. Register yours on Porkbun before someone else claims your ultimate gamer identity."

PGN Pork Gaming Network ESPORTS

Porkbun Pig Speedruns Domain Registration in 47 Seconds, New World Record

By SpeedPork_TAS | 45 min ago

In a stunning display of oink-hand coordination, the Porkbun Pig registered a new .com domain in just 47 seconds — from homepage to checkout confirmation. "The key is pre-loading your payment info and having your domain name ready," the pig explained during their post-run analysis on PorkTube. Skeptics claim the run used tool-assisted snout (TAS), but the pig insists it was all natural talent and low, low Porkbun prices.

Competitive Domain Squatting Now Recognized as Official Esport

By ProOinker2026 | 2 hours ago

The International Domain Athletics Federation (IDAF) has officially recognized competitive domain registration as an esport. Teams of 5 will compete to register the most creative domains in a 10-minute window. Porkbun has been named the official registrar sponsor. "We've been training for this our entire lives," said Team Snout's captain.

PORK TICKER
PNN .com registrations up 420% this quarter
P! New study: 9/10 pigs prefer Porkbun
PGN Pig wins "Best Mascot" award for 12th year
PNN Scientists discover pigs dream about domains
P! .pig TLD petition reaches 1M signatures
PGN Porkbun server uptime: 99.999% (and vibes)
PNN WHOIS privacy now included — "oink yeah!"
P! SSL certificates: free as in "free slop"
PGN Pig completes Porkbun any% glitchless run
PNN Domain aftermarket? More like "after-PORK-et"

@porkbun_official porkbun.bsky.pig

just registered my 500th domain name this year. i don't have a problem. i have a COLLECTION.

♡ 4,201 ↺ 892 💬 156
🐷
@snout_engineer dev.oink.pig

hot take: if your domain registrar doesn't have a pig mascot, can you really trust them with your online identity? i rest my case.

♡ 2,847 ↺ 1,203 💬 89
🐷
@domain_farmer barn.domains.pig

me: i should save money this month
porkbun: .dev domains on sale
me: well i NEED that for my project about—
narrator: they did not need it for any project.

♡ 8,532 ↺ 3,201 💬 445
🐷
@retro_pig vintage.web.pig

remember when registering a domain cost $70/year? dark times. anyway, just got 3 domains for less than a coffee. thank you porkbun. oink oink.

♡ 5,678 ↺ 1,890 💬 234
P PorkBook Connect. Oink. Share.

📸 ON THIS DAY: 3 years ago I registered my first domain on Porkbun. Now I have 247 domains and zero regrets. Okay maybe one regret (shouldveregisteredthissooner.com was already taken).

  ╔═══════════════════╗

15:42

Day in the Life of a Domain Registrar Pig (I registered 12 domains before breakfast)

PorkbunOfficial · 5.7M views · 1 month ago

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

[ README.TXT — The Pork-OS Manifesto ]

In the beginning, there was the internet. And it was formless, and void of affordable domain names.

Then came Porkbun — a scrappy little registrar with a pig mascot and a mission: make the web accessible, affordable, and actually fun.

The Porkbun Pig isn't just a logo. It's a statement. It says: "We don't take ourselves too seriously, but we take YOUR website very seriously." In a world of corporate registrars with forgettable branding, Porkbun chose a pig. A delightful, snout-forward, unapologetically charming pig.

PORK-OS reimagines that pig as the heart of a retro operating system — a world where every boot sequence oinks, every file path leads to something delicious, and your domain name is just a REGISTER.EXE away.

Because the internet should feel like home. And home should have a pig in it.

───────────────────

Built with love, pig puns, and too much coffee.

A Basement OS production for the Porkbun Creative Competition 2026.

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

[ SYSINFO.EXE ]

OSPORK-OS v1.0 (Snout Edition)
KERNELPigLinux 6.2.6-porkbun
CPUOinkCore i9-BACON @ 4.20 GHz
RAM16 GB TROUGH-5 DDR5
GPUPigForce RTX SNOUT Ti
STORAGE1 TB Truffle NVMe SSD
NETWORKPorkbun Fiber — 1 Gbps (oinks/sec)
UPTIMECalculating...
DOMAINS∞ (at unbeatable prices)
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

Ready to register your own domain?

🐷 VISIT PORKBUN.COM

Domains so cheap, they're practically sow-stealing.

───────────────────
← RETURN TO BASEMENT OS
🐷 1
🐷 Domain Name Brainstormer
Oink! I'm the Porkbun Pig, your personal domain name brainstormer! Tell me about your project, hobby, or idea, and I'll suggest some fun domain names!
Try something like: "a blog about cooking", "my photography portfolio", or just type anything!
